# Damman Area

**Summary**: Geographic study area or location in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2000-mohammad|Mohammad, 2000]] conducted research at Damman Area

- [[2014-adedapo|Adedapo, 2014]] studied the soil quality within the Dammam area.

- [[2025-oyekan|Oyekan, 2025]] conducted study at a site near Dammam Airport.

## Geological and Structural Setting



- [[2014-adedapo|Adedapo, 2014]] studied the soil quality within the Dammam area.

- [[2025-oyekan|Oyekan, 2025]] conducted study at a site near Dammam Airport.

## Key Findings From This Location

- conducted research at Damman Area ([[2000-mohammad|Mohammad, 2000]])

- Concentrations of Cd, Cr, Cu, and Zn exceeded limits in residential/industrial zones. ([[2014-adedapo|Adedapo, 2014, p. 12]])

- A barchan dune was located in the vicinity of Dammam, characterized by quartz and carbonate minerals. ([[2025-oyekan|Oyekan, 2025, p. 52]])
